hero.title: Transform Your Outdoor Space
hero.subtitle: Professional garden and landscaping services by Cristian Bogdan Ciobanu

transformation.title: Our Transformations
transformation.description: Drag the sliders to see the before and after results of our professional landscaping.
transformation.caption: Our professional landscaping services transform ordinary outdoor spaces into beautiful, functional environments. From complete garden renovations to regular lawn maintenance, we deliver exceptional results.

gallery.title: Our Project Gallery
gallery.description: Browse our collection of completed landscaping and garden projects.

showcase.title: Let's create your dream garden with our professional garden and landscaping services

services.title: Our Services
services.description: We offer a comprehensive range of garden and landscaping services to meet all your outdoor needs.

lawnCare.title: Lawn Care & Maintenance
lawnCare.description: Regular mowing, fertilizing, aeration, and weed control to keep your lawn healthy and vibrant all year round. We adjust cutting heights by season, spot-treat problem areas, and advise on soil health so your grass stays dense and resilient. Whether you need a one-time tidy-up or an ongoing maintenance plan, we keep your lawn looking its best with reliable, scheduled visits.

treeTrimming.title: Tree Trimming / Removal
treeTrimming.description: Professional pruning, crown reduction, and safe removal of dead or hazardous trees to protect your property and keep your landscape healthy. We assess structure and growth habits before cutting, clear debris from your site, and can grind stumps where required. From shaping ornamental trees to dismantling storm-damaged limbs, we work carefully around buildings, fences, and utilities.

planting.title: Planting Services
planting.description: Expert selection and installation of trees, shrubs, flowers, and other plants suitable for your local climate and soil conditions. We prepare beds, improve soil where needed, and space plants for mature size so your borders stay balanced for years. After planting, we can set up mulching and watering guidance to help everything establish strongly.

irrigation.title: Irrigation Systems
irrigation.description: Planning and installation of efficient irrigation systems to ensure your garden is optimally watered with minimal water usage. We design layouts around lawn, beds, and containers, choose appropriate sprinklers or drip lines, and program controllers for seasonal adjustments. Repairs, winterization, and spring start-up help keep your system reliable season after season.

landscaping.title: Landscaping
landscaping.description: Creation of patios, walkways, retaining walls, and other structural elements that complement your landscape design. We handle grading, base preparation, and drainage so surfaces stay level and long-lasting. From small path upgrades to full outdoor living areas, we coordinate materials and finishes to match your home and garden style.

seasonalCleaning.title: Seasonal Cleaning
seasonalCleaning.description: Thorough spring and fall cleanup to prepare your garden for the growing season or winter months. We clear leaves and debris, cut back perennials where appropriate, and tidy beds and lawn edges for a crisp appearance. Optional services include hedge trimming, gutter clearing near garden areas, and hauling green waste so your property is ready for the next season.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Us
whyChoose.description: With over 15 years of experience in the industry, we take pride in delivering exceptional service and results.

experiencedTeam.title: Experienced Team
experiencedTeam.description: Our team of qualified professionals has years of experience in garden and landscape construction.

qualityMaterials.title: Quality Materials
qualityMaterials.description: We use only the highest quality plants, materials, and equipment for all our projects.

customSolutions.title: Custom Solutions
customSolutions.description: We develop tailored solutions that meet your specific needs and preferences.

satisfaction.title: Satisfaction Guarantee
satisfaction.description: We're not satisfied until you're completely happy with the results of our work.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.description: Don't just take our word for it - hear what our satisfied customers have to say about our services.

items.text: "Cristian transformed our backyard from a barren wasteland into a lush paradise. His attention to detail and knowledge of plants is impressive! We couldn't be happier with the results."
items.author: Maria D.

items.text: "We've tried several gardeners before, but none compare to Christian's expertise. Our lawn has never looked better! His team is professional, punctual, and truly cares about the work they do."
items.author: John T.

items.text: "Professional, punctual, and passionate about his work. Cristian doesn't just do the job, he creates art with nature. Our garden has become the envy of the neighborhood."
items.author: Elena M.
